name: Samba Time Machine
description: Turn a Proxmox LXC into a Time Machine backup server for macOS. Uses Samba with the 'fruit' module for native Time Machine SMB protocol support, and Avahi for automatic mDNS discovery.

notes.text: Credentials are saved to ~/samba-timemachine.creds inside the container.
After installation, add your Mac via System Settings → Time Machine → Add Backup Disk. The share appears automatically via mDNS.
